cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking how to save money when visiting Disney World according to the passage. The options are A to D. First, I need to recall the passage. The main points about saving money mentioned were: avoiding peak seasons, staying outside the resort can save money if staying for a week or two, using budget hotels with shuttle services, buying food ahead of time (eating at hotel or cheaper restaurants instead of in Disney), and carrying food and drinks to reduce costs. Looking at the options: A) By going there in the peak seasons. Wait, the passage said peak seasons are costly. So this would not save money. So A is incorrect. B) By staying outside the resort for a week or two. The passage mentions that staying outside the resort can save a large amount if you stay for a week or two. So B
